title: Teleportation Stone
description: This mod adds a craftable item that can teleport you where you need to go... at the cost of ender pearls.
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d22a27f6caa87ac94bedbda2e992ea1f05039a2.jpeg)
### Mod Overview

Welcome to the Teleportation Stone Mod! This mod introduces an exciting new item that revolutionizes travel within the game. Say goodbye to long walks and tedious journeys; with this mod, you can instantly teleport to any location using the power of ender pearls.

### Key Features
**Teleportation Stone:**

**Crafting Recipe:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83a5ebc3ad9a9c5ca411df3249f835ad81494065.png)

</details>


### Coordinates Selection:
Function: The Teleportation Stone allows players to teleport to any location. Simply right-click while holding the item, and you will be prompted to enter the coordinates you wish to teleport to. The cost for each teleportation is one ender pearl.

### Directional Teleportation:

Quick Teleport: Teleport 100 blocks in the direction you are facing with a simple shift right-click action. This feature is perfect for quick escapes, fast travel, or exploring new areas.
Cost: Each directional teleportation also consumes one ender pearl.
Additional Features
Ender Pearl Consumption: Ensure you have enough ender pearls in your inventory, as both teleportation methods consume one ender pearl per use.

### Compatibility
Minecraft Versions: The Teleportation Mod is compatible with Minecraft version 1.20.1 and new versions are in the process of being made compatible.
Multiplayer Support: Fully compatible with both single-player and multiplayer servers, allowing you to teleport seamlessly in any game mode.

### Support me

     The best way to support me if you can afford it is through paypal. But just downloading my mods and showing them to your friends is plenty. Thank You!
